description: Diagnose and fix a configuration precedence issue in the Docker Compose project at ~/projects/finance-core/. The application fails to connect to the production database because docker-compose.yml contains hardcoded development values that override the credentials in .env.prod. Modify docker-compose.yml to remove these hardcoded overrides and enable environment variable injection, ensuring that the complex password with special characters in .env.prod is handled correctly. Verify the fix by running start_prod.sh and confirming the application logs 'CONNECTION ESTABLISHED'.
